message:
feat(lab): agent-friendly report API and schema v2 (bd-f262i)

Extend SporkHarnessReport with convenience methods for agent integration
and bump schema version for the stable JSON contract.

Schema version: 1 → 2
- Added: config_hash for quick equivalence checking across runs
- Added: verdict concept (passed/failed) as top-level accessor
- Backward compatible: no breaking changes to existing fields

New convenience methods on SporkHarnessReport:
- passed(): quick pass/fail verdict (oracles + invariants)
- trace_fingerprint(): canonical trace fingerprint
- seed(): lab seed for this run
- config_hash(): stable hash of LabConfig for "same setup?" checks
- crashpack_path(): first crashpack attachment path (if any)
- oracle_failures(): structured list of oracle failure descriptions
- summary_line(): one-liner for agent logs
  Format: [PASS|FAIL] app="X" seed=N fingerprint=N oracles=P/T

New method on LabConfigSummary:
- config_hash(): deterministic hash over all config fields including
  chaos parameters, using DefaultHasher for reproducibility

Agents can now quickly check verdicts without parsing nested structures,
verify config equivalence across runs, and emit structured log lines.

Closes bd-f262i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
